creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #5)

As this changes can be made by portmgr we can close this PR now to simplify the process.
Since you already commit it to your tree, I will wait without make further changes to main related to adding GNU_CONFIGURE_MANPREFIX.

Thanks very much for your work on this.

Have fun :)
